# Pull request

## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting behavior.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `bash -n start.sh`
- [ ] Provider-specific smoke tests, when applicable

## Security and operations

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, prompts, or private logs are included
- [ ] Configuration and database compatibility were considered
- [ ] Child-process cleanup and request cancellation were considered
- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-visible changes

## Related issue

Closes #
